title: REPEAT protocol extended data
author: Eleanor Mishra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The REPEAT study is an observational cohort study. It is funded by an NIHR RfPB grant. This extended data includes consent form, patient information sheet and visual analogue scale diary
steps_raw: The REPEAT study is an observational cohort study. It is funded by an NIHR RfPB grant. This extended data includes consent form, patient information sheet and visual analogue scale diary
